result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (CatalogException): Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name julianday does not exist!
Did you mean "julian"?

LINE 1: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate...
                                         ^"

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(cast(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP)) - julian(cast(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP))) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, AVG(julian(cast(c.CompanySignedDate AS TIMESTAMP)) - julian(cast(o.CreatedDate AS TIMESTAMP))) AS AvgTurnaroundDays FROM Opportunity o JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '') WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.OwnerId HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY AvgTurnaroundDays ASC LIMIT 1;
